description: STETHOSCOPE input, Military Cryptanalytics, part I, lesson 9, problem 1

ciphertext.notes: 1. The following cryptogram is suspected to begin with the words 'REFERENCE YOUR MESSAGE NUMBER THREE FIVE FOUR DATED ONE SEVEN SEPTEMBER 11'. Solve the text, and reconstruct the cryptosystem employed.  ERROR FOUND: computed P=24/R=31 vs expected P=23/R=32.
